hints.text: US overseas territory (counts as US); car fully blurred but a **front-right antenna** shows, **closer to the camera** than Guam's — and no roof rack
**Wooden poles**, often w/ a crossbar (Guam uses concrete poles)
Tropical, dense low vegetation; the red-flowered **Flame Tree** (Royal Poinciana, Delonix regia) is the official tree & common (not in Guam)
**East Asian languages** (Japanese, Chinese, Korean, Russian) + a huge number of road reflectors (as in Guam)
Only **Saipan** has car coverage (islands to the north have none; Tinian & Rota only tripod); Suicide Cliff = exposed rock at the northern tip
